findings.title: Avoid a second payload_info scan on URMA Get
findings.impact: Every successful remote URMA Get with payload metadata now calls HasUrmaTcpFallbackPayload, which linearly scans rsp.payload_info just before FillUrmaBuffer scans the same repeated field again. For batch Get/MGet with many small objects this adds avoidable protobuf traversal on a request-critical path even when no TCP fallback occurred.
findings.fix: Fold fallback detection into the existing FillUrmaBuffer payload_info loop, or have FillUrmaBuffer return whether any part_index entries were already present, then record the URMA result from that value without a separate pre-pass.
